items.title: Training pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Pretraining on text] --> B[Supervised fine-tuning]
  B --> C[Feedback alignment RLHF / RLAIF]
  C --> D[Evals & red teaming]
  D --> E[Released Claude model]
items.caption: Simplified lifecycle from base language model to a versioned Claude model you can call.
